name: Windy Peaks
description: The mountain range above Noctum's Marrow. Wind-blasted stone, ancient roads, and the echo of a dead war god. The first time you see the sky — and realize the world it belongs to is dying. At the peak, the world opens: a vast grove stretches below the far ridge, ancient and tangled. The only way forward is down.

dangerZone.description: Exposed slopes and peak ridge. PvP enabled.
